final:
module top_module(
    input in,
    input clock,
	 input reset,
    output reg out
    );reg prev_in;
	 
	   wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clock or posedge dbg_halt) begin
		if (reset) begin
			prev_in <= 0;
		end
		else begin
			if ((prev_in == 0) && (in == 1)) begin
				out <= 1;
			end
			else begin
				out <= 0;
			end
			prev_in <= in;
		end
	 end

endmodule
